message:
feat(pool): implement read replica routing (bd-33gi)

Add ReplicaPool for routing reads to replicas and writes to primary:

- ReplicaPool<C> wraps a primary Pool and Vec<Pool> of replicas
- acquire_read() selects replica via configurable strategy
- acquire_write() always routes to primary
- acquire_primary() for read-after-write consistency
- ReplicaStrategy: RoundRobin, Random
- Falls back to primary when no replicas configured
- Re-exported from facade crate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
